title: EMERGENCY SHELTER - 211info
text: BEND OFFICE EMERGENCY SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a low-barrier, temporary shelter. The units provide private bedrooms and baths. Guests must meet weekly with a supportive services advocate. 20310 Empire Avenue Suite A100 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with children. Sobriety is not required; no substance use allowed on site. Hours: Intake line: Tuesdays and Thursdays noon-4pm Stepping Stone office hours: 7 days per week 8am-8pm Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 548-2380 Main phone Main phone (541) 548-2380 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to complete housing assesment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties and the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - CENTRAL OREGON’S COORDINATED ENTRY SYSTEM HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMESOURCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND OFFICE
